calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC's Motion For Assignment of Rights, restraining order and turnover order.

Judgment creditor Align Technology, Inc.'s motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in Open court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No: 6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Continued To Oct-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Etc. is continued to October 17, 2017 at 9:30 am, Law and Motion Calendar, Department 302. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
